description_long: This object is a long, slender knife or sword with a straight, narrow blade that tapers to a fine point. The blade appears metallic, with a subtle sheen and a uniform, smooth surface, suggesting it is made of steel or a similar metal. The handle is minimally visible but seems to be integrated seamlessly with the blade, lacking any pronounced ergonomic features or decorative elements. There is no visible crossguard or pommel, giving the object a very streamlined and utilitarian appearance. The coloration is predominantly gray with slight variations in tone, likely due to lighting or material finish. The overall design is simple and functional, with no visible ornamentation or embellishments.
description: A long, straight, narrow-bladed knife or sword with a smooth metallic finish and a minimalist handle.
description_view_0: A thin edge-on view showing the extreme slenderness and straightness of the blade.
description_view_1: Another edge-on view, slightly rotated, still emphasizing the blade's thin profile and uniform width.
description_view_2: A slightly angled view revealing more of the blade's flat surface and its metallic sheen.
description_view_3: A view showing the opposite flat side of the blade, highlighting its straight, unadorned design.
